title: The Connecting Medium.
content:
How does nature proceed to unite the high and the lowly
    In mankind? She commands vanity 'tween them to stand!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Connecting Medium.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
